events.text: Own Goal by John Boye, Ghana.  Portugal 1, Ghana 0.
Harrison Afful (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Abdul Waris (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Portugal 1, Ghana 1. Asamoah Gyan (Ghana) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Kwadwo Asamoah with a cross.
Jordan Ayew (Ghana) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Portugal 2, Ghana 1. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner.
João Moutinho (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
